comment: Example configuration for svg-icon-generator.py. Copy and modify for each icon.
comment_foreground: Legacy switch (true=light glyph). Superseded by foreground_mode when that is set
comment_foreground_mode: null uses foreground_is_light. Else one of: 'light' | 'dark' | 'nonwhite' (colored/gradient ink on white) | 'alpha' (opaque region of a transparent PNG)
comment_white_threshold: Off-white cutoff (0-255) for 'nonwhite' mode - a pixel is ink if min(r,g,b) is below this
comment_alpha_threshold: Opacity cutoff (0-255) for 'alpha' mode; also excludes transparent pixels in 'nonwhite' mode
comment_crop_threshold: Whiteness cutoff (0-255) for auto-crop margin detection (distinct from light_threshold)
comment_auto_crop: Trim the empty border (white for RGB sources, transparent for alpha) before masking
comment_circle: Set to true if the icon is a glyph inside a circular badge (auto-detects the container circle)
comment_inset: Shrink detected circle slightly to avoid anti-aliasing artifacts (0.99-0.999)
comment_opt: Curve-fitting tolerance. Lower = more accurate/more nodes (0.05-0.2 for detailed icons)
comment_alpha: Corner-smoothing threshold. Keep 1.0-1.5 for sharp corners without over-rounding
comment_turd: Suppress noise specks smaller than N pixels (2-8; lower preserves small details)
comment_sizes: Output sizes in pixels. Proportions are preserved across all sizes
comment_fill: Glyph's largest dimension as fraction of its own canvas (0.8-0.95). Ignored in tight mode
comment_tight: Borderless output: non-square viewBox wrapping the glyph exactly (no padding, no badge)
comment_save_cropped: Path to also write the auto-cropped source image (transparency preserved), or null to skip

badge.comment_diameter: Glyph size relative to circle diameter (0.5-0.75)
badge.comment_offset: Vertical nudge (fraction of canvas). Positive = downward. Use 0 for perfect center

comment_badge: Set to null to skip badge variant generation: "badge": null
